CommunityApplications.Profile:
Docker application templates for Unraid Community Applications, maintained by [Mike Mitterer](https://github.com/MikeMitterer).
**Apps in this repository:**
- **StockInfo** — self-hosted stock and ETF quote service: REST API (JSON) with a Vue dashboard, SQLite cache and periodic refresh. Data sources: Yahoo Finance (yfinance), justETF, OpenFIGI.
Support for each app is handled via GitHub Issues in the app's source repository (linked in the template).
